title: AutocompleteRequest
description: Request body for place autocomplete predictions

input.description: The text input specifying which place to search for

includedRegionCodes.description: Restrict results to these region codes

inputOffset.description: Zero-based Unicode character offset of input indicating the cursor position. Use to return more relevant predictions.

includeQueryPredictions.description: Whether to include query predictions in results

sessionToken.description: A random string that groups this request with subsequent Place Details requests for billing.
